🎯 SPY — DEALER EM BRIEF (3-5 DTE)  |  Exp: 05-13
🧲 NO TRADE — GEX positive (+$12.4M), score only +4/14 — not enough edge.

🧭 Bias: BULLISH (score 4/14)
📍 Spot: $588.50
📐 1σ Range: $582.95 – $594.05
🌀 Gamma Flip: $585.00  (spot above)
📵 Call Wall / Resistance: $595.00
🛡️ Put Wall / Support: $580.00
🎯 Gamma Wall: $590.00
🧨 Range-break triggers
• Up: above $594.05
• Down: below $582.95
🔄 Regime-shift trigger
• Lose gamma flip: $585.00
⚙️ Dealer Regime (3-5 DTE): PIN / RANGE — Spot is still trapped near balance / pin structure. Favor watchlist mode until a clean break confirms direction. Context: inside dealer pin zone.
🧭 Raw Dealer Flow: SUPPRESSING (institutional flow model)
🚦 Entry filter: trigger required beyond local structure before treating this as directional.
🏦 Dealer Structure: spot above flip | flip $585.00 | walls $580.00/$595.00
🌡️ Volatility Regime: 🌡️ NORMAL | VIX 18.5 | > MA200 | term normal
🪖 Posture: Reduce size. Wait for a clean break beyond local structure before treating this as directional.

────────────────────────────────
📡 WHAT TO DO — Plain English
🕐 Midday: Chop zone — failed moves are best.
⚙️ GEX is POSITIVE — failed moves and mean reversion are MORE LIKELY than continuation.
   → Don't chase breakouts. TRADE THE FAILURES.
📈 Above gamma flip $585.00 — bullish structure. Dealers buy dips.

🎯 SETUPS TO WATCH:
  IF price drops below $582.95 (range break) → watch for trap. Reclaim = squeeze long. Continuation = real breakdown.
  IF price pops above $594.05 (range break) → watch for trap. Lost = fade short. Holds = real breakout.

⚠️ MOMENTUM RULES (on 5m chart):
  A break is ONLY valid with large 5m candles + continuation on the next candle.
  Small candles breaking a level = likely a TRAP. Wait for the failure.
  If your trade's momentum fades (5m candles getting smaller) → tighten or exit.
